focus_points.label: Decision rights and expectations across partners.
focus_points.reason: Whether her week-four planning threads are matched by clear decision rights—what she can decide vs what needs escalation—and what “good” looks like to partners when priorities conflict.

focus_points.label: How she runs alignment when priorities conflict.
focus_points.reason: How she approaches cross-functional alignment without over-indexing on consensus—what she does to pre-wire decisions, surface tradeoffs, and lock next steps when others disagree.

focus_points.label: How she signals plans and tradeoffs in meetings.
focus_points.reason: What she says in cross-functional meetings when priorities collide—could be unclear framing, missing context, or uncertainty in tone—and what she’d want to do differently so partners don’t interpret silence or hedging as lack of ownership.

focus_points.label: What she wants from you to de-risk norms.
focus_points.reason: What she’d want more of from you in an onboarding check-in—explicit norms, example decision paths, and quick feedback loops—so she spends less energy decoding unspoken expectations and more on executing planning threads confidently.
